description: Linear theory of viscoelasticity; non-aging materials; Boltzmann superposition principle; time-temperature superposition boundary value problems. Applications: vibration damping, relaxation of stress, creep, droop, and sag in structural members, sound absorption, creep buckling, settlement of foundations, tire mechanics, and shock attenuation.

prerequisites.prerequisites_text: M E 306orE M A 303, or graduate/professional standing, or member of Engineering Guest Students
